details.note: Canonical RuntimeEvent Effect Schema with 21 fields: id, sessionId, runId, parentEventId, correlationId, ts, actor, eventType, phase, status, toolName, filePath, model, durationMs, tokenInput, tokenOutput, errorCode, errorMessage, recoverable, payloadJson
Drizzle ORM runtime_events table with 6 indexes on session_id, event_type, ts, actor, run_id, and composite session_id+ts
EventStore Effect service with record() and query() methods using DatabaseAdapter.Service
Bus→EventStore bridge that subscribes to all bus events and persists them via Effect.forkScoped background fiber
